content.text: Welcome to FinSPA
FinSPA is a modern Single Page Application (SPA) for the holistic management of your assets and budget.
The 3-Column Layout

items: **Structure Tree (Left):** Here you manage your banks, brokers, categories, and the assets contained within them.
**Editor & Dashboards (Center):** The central workspace for evaluations, dashboards, and transactions.
**Property Editor (Right):** Edit master data for the selected element.

content.text: Structuring Your Wealth
**Record Banks:** At the top level in the structure tree (click on the `+` icon).
**Create Categories:** Nested as deep as desired within banks (click on the folder icon with a plus).
Manage Assets & Accounts
**Record Assets:** The deepest element in the tree is always an asset (e.g., account, portfolio).
**Transactions:** Record transactions such as deposits or withdrawals with detailed subcategories (salary, taxes, etc.).
Trading Stocks and Funds
Set the asset class to stock or fund. Record purchases, sales, and dividends.
The dialog automatically asks for quantity, price, fees, taxes, and the current daily exchange rate.
In the event of a stock split, archive the old asset and create a new one with the current values.
Occupational & Tied Pension (Switzerland)

items: **Pension Fund (2nd Pillar):** Your occupational pension wealth. Marked as *illiquid*.
**3a Pension Account:** Tied cash assets of private provision.
**3a Pension Portfolio:** Allows the trading and tracking of 3rd pillar funds.

content.text: Crypto Assets
Bitcoin, Ethereum, etc. behave like stocks but are considered highly liquid.
Management of Tangible Assets

items: **Real Estate:** Positive value. Use *Value Adjustment* for market value changes.
**Mortgage:** Recorded as a *negative reporting date balance*. Use *Payoff* or *Interest Payment*.

content.text: Local AI Integration (Ollama)
FinSPA offers an integrated interface to local Large Language Models (LLMs) via Ollama. Your financial data never leaves your device.

items: **Generate Widgets:** Describe in natural language which charts or tables you want to see.
**Dynamic Interaction:** The AI builds custom dashboards based on your live data.
**Activation:** The AI mode must first be enabled globally in the settings.

content.text: Prerequisite: You must have Ollama installed locally and host a compatible model (e.g., Qwen, Llama 3) via port 11434.
Comprehensive Analyses

items: **Inventory Reports:** Allocation, liquidity risk, and tax reports.
**Movement Reports:** Cash flows, transaction analyses, and passive income.
**Future Reports:** Simulation of the future incl. regressions and custom future scenarios (FIRE savings goals).

content.text: Configuration
**Extensibility:** You can define base currencies, custom transaction categories, and even completely new asset classes.
**AI Models:** Add your own Ollama models (strings) in the respective tab.
**Data Backup:** Use JSON for secure, local backups.
